DURING LAUNCH OF 2015 CHRYSLER 200 AT STERLING HEIGHTS ASSEMBLY PLANT VEHICLES HAVE HAD AT LEAST 30 TORQUE FAILURES OR NO READS FOR CRITICAL JOINTS. THEREFORE TORQUE WOULD HAVE TO BE VERIFIED MANUALLY. UNFORTUNATELY THE COMPANY HAS NOT PROVIDED THE PROPER SOCKETS TO THE WRENCHES

THIS INCIDENT HAS HAPPENED ON TWO SEPARATE OCCASIONS.  WHILE DRIVING ON THE HIGHWAY AT SPEEDS AROUND 60 TO 70 MPH, MY CAR WILL SUDDENLY STALL, AND I AM UNABLE TO ACCELERATE. MY ELECTRONIC DASH DISPLAY WOULD BEGIN BLINKING, AND I HAVE NO POWER TO THE PEDAL AT ALL. ON BOTH OCCASION

narrative.headline: What 2015 Chrysler 200 owners report most
narrative.summary: The most-reported problems center on the electrical system and powertrain, with owners frequently describing unexpected stalls and shutoffs while driving at various speeds. Engine-related stalling complaints mirror the electrical reports closely, and powertrain complaints include torque failures noted during vehicle assembly. A smaller share of reports concerns airbags failing to deploy in side-impact collisions.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling and shutting off while in motion at various speeds, requiring the driver to coast to the side of the road before restarting. · 11 fire · 27 crash · 13 injured

issues.sample: DURING LAUNCH OF 2015 CHRYSLER 200 AT STERLING HEIGHTS ASSEMBLY PLANT VEHICLES HAVE HAD AT LEAST 30 TORQUE FAILURES OR NO READS FOR CRITICAL JOINTS. THEREFORE TORQUE WOULD HAVE TO BE VERIFIED MANUALLY. UNFORTUNATELY THE COMPANY HAS NOT PROVIDED THE PROPER SOCKETS TO THE WRENCHES
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report torque failures and missing torque readings on critical joints, with complaints noting that torque had to be verified manually. · 22 crash · 12 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine stalling on multiple occasions while driving, with the car shutting off entirely and requiring the driver to coast to a stop. · 12 fire · 18 crash · 7 injured

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Owners report side airbags failing to deploy during impacts that struck the driver's door and fender with enough force that deployment was expected. · 2 fire · 38 crash · 31 injured
